screenshot.permissionAlert: FluxLocus needs Screen Recording permission to show live screen and window previews. System Settings has been opened. After enabling it, quit and reopen FluxLocus.

helper.denied: Microphone access was denied. Open System Settings to grant permission.
helper.notDetermined: Microphone permission is required. Click 'Grant Access' below.
helper.requesting: Requesting microphone access to show all inputs...
helper.permissionDenied: Microphone access was denied. Using the system default microphone.
helper.fallback: Using the system default microphone in this window.

camera.label: Facecam
camera.openDeviceMenu: Click the camera icon to choose a device.
camera.selectToEnable: Select a camera to enable facecam.

helper.denied: Camera access was denied. Open System Settings to grant permission.
helper.requesting: Requesting camera access to show all cameras...
helper.permissionDenied: Camera access was denied. Using the default camera when available.
helper.fallback: Camera device listing is unavailable in this window.
helper.ready: Choose which facecam to preview and record.
